Thanks Lisa! The men and women on the crews continue to fly the missions out of Mobile. Please keep them in your thoughts as they still have to do their jobs while their own families are directly in the path. They are all truly inspiring and a textbook definition of public service. Trust me I have been there many times and it's a very difficult thing to do. I was working ground crew but had to stay back because my oldest fractured his leg playing hockey last Thursday and wanted to be there for him at home.
And NO they are NOT "seeding" or "steering" the storms by any stretch of some misinformed politicians warped imagination. These rumours are irresponsible, dangerous and disrespectul to the men and women who literally put their lives on the line to provide information to help protect others.
